name: edge_cases
description: 10 edge-case prompts testing validation and repair
prompts: CRM with login but no authentication and no users
E-commerce with payments via Stripe and also no payment processing
Build admin dashboard only without any data entities or database
Create API-only backend with 50 different microservices and blockchain
Simple todo list with infinite nesting subtasks sub-sub-tasks recursive
Build HIPAA-compliant medical records with public anonymous access no login
Social network with friends messaging photos videos live streaming marketplace jobs
Inventory system where users can delete all data without confirmation and no audit log
